clear.description: Clears the slot (loads a unity gain module).

exists.description: Checks if the Object exists and prints a error message on the console if not.

getCurrentEffect.description: Returns a reference to the currently loaded effect.

getCurrentEffectId.description: Returns the ID of the effect that is currently loaded.

getModuleList.description: Returns the list of all available modules that you can load into the slot (might be empty if there is no compiled dll present).

getParameterProperties.description: Returns a JSON object containing all parameters with their range properties.

setBypassed.description: Bypasses the effect. This uses the soft bypass feature of the SlotFX module.

setEffect.description: Loads the effect with the given name and returns a reference to it.

swap.description: Swaps the effect with the other slot.
